# Superserve

> Superserve is the deployment platform for AI agents. Deploy Python and TypeScript agents to isolated, persistent sandboxes with one command.

## Docs

- [Introduction](https://docs.superserve.ai/introduction): What Superserve is - isolated sandboxes, full environment persistence via snapshots, credential proxy, audit trail, zero-config deployment, and supported frameworks.
- [Quickstart](https://docs.superserve.ai/quickstart): Deploy your first agent - install the CLI, write a Python or TypeScript agent, deploy, set API keys, and run a conversation.
- [Deployment](https://docs.superserve.ai/zero-config): How deployment works - supported languages (Python, TypeScript), stdio and HTTP server modes, automatic dependency detection, project structure, and optional configuration.
- [Sessions](https://docs.superserve.ai/sessions): How sessions work - multi-turn conversations, resuming previous sessions, idle timeout, session titles, session lifecycle, and programmatic session management.
- [Authentication](https://docs.superserve.ai/authentication): How to log in - OAuth 2.0 device flow, API key authentication for CI/CD, credential storage, and logout.
- [Troubleshooting](https://docs.superserve.ai/troubleshooting): Common issues - agent not responding, missing API keys, response not streaming, slow responses, and dependency installation failures.
- [SDK](https://docs.superserve.ai/sdk): TypeScript client and React hooks - run(), stream(), session management, agent listing, useAgent hook, configuration, and error handling.
- [CLI](https://docs.superserve.ai/cli): All commands and flags - login, deploy, init, run, secrets, agents, and sessions.

## Frameworks

Superserve works with any agent framework. Your agent reads from stdin and writes to stdout - no SDK or wrapper required.

- [Claude Agent SDK](https://docs.superserve.ai/frameworks/claude-agent-sdk): Deploy a Claude agent with tool use and conversation memory. Python and TypeScript examples.
- [OpenAI Agents SDK](https://docs.superserve.ai/frameworks/openai-agents-sdk): Deploy an OpenAI agent with handoffs and guardrails. Python and TypeScript examples.
- [LangChain](https://docs.superserve.ai/frameworks/langchain): Deploy a LangChain agent with chains and retrieval. Python and TypeScript examples.
- [Pydantic AI](https://docs.superserve.ai/frameworks/pydantic-ai): Deploy a type-safe agent with structured outputs. Python example.
- [Agno](https://docs.superserve.ai/frameworks/agno): Deploy a lightweight Python agent.
- [Mastra](https://docs.superserve.ai/frameworks/mastra): Deploy a TypeScript-first agent with AI SDK. TypeScript example.
